tasks.notes: Part: LT120F — hold Air Filter button 3 sec to reset indicator
Parts: LT1000P / LT1000PC / ADQ747935 — expect ~1oz drainage on removal
Unplug first; baking soda + water (2 tbsp/qt); remove shelves before cleaning
Mild detergent only — no bleach, waxes, or petroleum-based cleaners
Vacuum with brush/crevice attachment on condenser cover
Stainless: microfiber cloth with grain; dry immediately to prevent streaks

Whirlpool|Dishwasher|WDT750SAKZ.notes: Manual is for WDT750SAKW (white); same hardware generation as WDT750SAKZ (stainless)

tasks.notes: Heavy use (8–12 loads/wk) may need monthly; 1/4 turn counterclockwise to remove; rinse under running water; no wire brushes
affresh® Dishwasher Cleaner tablet, or 2 cups white vinegar on bottom rack — run without detergent or dishes
Clean if dishwasher is draining slowly
Soft damp cloth + mild detergent only; avoid abrasives and scouring pads
Turn off water supply and power for extended storage periods
